description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 10th; Slot none; Price 40,000 gp; Weight 1/2 lb. DESCRIPTION This cube of force only creates one type of screen, which excludes living matter. Each of the five active faces sets the screen to exclude a different type of living matter (using the same categories as the bane weapon special ability). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, summon monster I, wall of force; Cost 20,000 gp
